hook.headline: Hook collapses at 2s — predicted attention drops 11 pts, led by visual.
hook.suggestedFix: Your hook scores 18.7/100 overall. Visual is your strongest channel (40.8/100) but audio is nearly absent (4.4/100). Add a strong audio cue in the first 2 seconds — a visual hook, key phrase, or sound that signals what the video is about.

caveats: Scores are normalized within this clip and should be read as relative timing signals, not universal retention percentages.
This analysis is deterministic and does not use an LLM. Feed llm_context into an LLM to generate polished human-facing coaching.
